description: Camera intent recipes as DATA (ADR-008 I4). Each preset is a from→to ramp over the scene's frame span: `position` is a pixel offset [x,y] relative to the resting frame centre; `zoom` is a multiplier (1.0 = neutral). The camera pass (src/pipeline/camera.ts) reads this table and expands a preset into concrete {a,k} keyframes generically — no magic numbers live in core code as the source of truth. A story may also pass ARBITRARY explicit position/zoom keyframes through its beat camera, bypassing this table entirely.
